businessSummary.oneLiner: World's largest EV maker and 'Physical AI Platform' spanning autonomous driving, robotics, and energy
businessSummary.description: Tesla is transitioning from pure EV manufacturing to an integrated AI/robotics/energy platform. FY2025 revenue $94.8B (-2.9% YoY), net income $3.79B (-46.5% YoY). Friday close $391.20 (-0.96%). China Jan-Feb EV sales rebound is positive, but Reuters warns of potential third consecutive year of delivery decline. Musk unveiled 'Macrohard (Digital Optimus)' xAI joint project. GTC 2026 (3/16-19) could reignite autonomous driving narrative. Market cap $1.26T, P/E ~362x, Forward P/E ~188x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Vehicle Sales: ~73% of revenue ($69.5B). Model 3/Y core, Model S/X discontinuing Q2 2026
Energy Business: ~14% of revenue ($12.8B, +27% YoY). Megapack/Powerwall growth
Services/Other: ~10% of revenue. Supercharger network, insurance, parts
FSD/Software: License revenue ~$3B. Subscription conversion accelerating

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extreme valuation. Very high for an EV maker but reflects AI/robotics premium

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on $2.08 EPS estimate. Still elevated

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Down from FY2024's 7.24%. Price cuts + cost increases impacting

keyMetrics.name: FCF
keyMetrics.interpretation: +73.7% improvement from prior year's $3.58B. Cash generation recovering

keyMetrics.name: Debt Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: $44B+ cash on hand. Minimal debt burden

keyMetrics.name: ROE
keyMetrics.interpretation: Low return on equity. Can improve with margin recovery

keyMetrics.name: Gross Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Slight improvement from FY2024's 17.86%. Above EV industry average

growthDrivers.title: China Feb EV Sales +91% YoY Surge — Sales Momentum Confirmed
growthDrivers.description: Reuters (3/11): China-made EV sales surged 91% YoY in February, marking four consecutive months of growth. Low base effect + price cuts + new model impact. Tesla's rebound stands out as BYD slows.

growthDrivers.title: GTC 2026 (3/16-19) — Autonomous Driving Theme Revival D-2
growthDrivers.description: NVIDIA GTC to unveil Rubin architecture. CPU-centric AI agent infrastructure could catalyze FSD/robotaxi ecosystem. Potential reassessment of Tesla's autonomous driving technology.

growthDrivers.title: FSD Data NHTSA Submission Complete — Regulatory Milestone
growthDrivers.description: AInvest (3/10): FSD driving data submitted to NHTSA on 3/9. Regulatory approval progress could accelerate robotaxi timeline. Key event for Tesla's autonomous driving narrative.

growthDrivers.title: Macrohard (Digital Optimus) — xAI Joint Software Venture
growthDrivers.description: Reuters (3/11): Musk unveiled Tesla-xAI joint 'Macrohard' project. Grok LLM-based AI agents for office automation. Potential new software revenue stream and valuation catalyst.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 50%+ US EV market share leader (globally overtaken by BYD). Software/manufacturing/energy/FSD 8.2B mile vertical integration is the core moat.

moats.description: 8.2 billion FSD miles driven. Overwhelmingly more training data than competitors.
Proprietary batteries (4680), custom chips (HW4), software (FSD), charging infrastructure (Supercharger).
NACS is the North American EV charging standard. GM, Ford, Rivian depend on Tesla Superchargers.

competitors.name: BYD
competitors.detail: 2025 global EV sales 2.26M units (+28%). Overtook Tesla's 1.64M (-9%)

competitors.name: Lucid (LCID)
competitors.detail: Q4 revenue $523M (+123%). Targeting premium EV market

competitors.name: Rivian (RIVN)
competitors.detail: R2 launch for mass market entry

competitors.name: Waymo (Alphabet)
competitors.detail: Expanding autonomous taxi service. L4 autonomy leader

recentNews.headline: Tesla China Jan-Feb sales rebound while BYD declines
recentNews.significance: Tesla China EV sales +35% YoY rebound. BYD slowing. Signals shift in competitive dynamics.

recentNews.headline: Tesla China-made EV sales jump 91% in February
recentNews.significance: Four consecutive months of growth. Low base + pricing strategy driving recovery. Hints at global delivery rebound.

recentNews.headline: Musk unveils joint Tesla-xAI project 'Macrohard'
recentNews.significance: Grok LLM-based AI agent system for office automation. Tesla software revenue diversification strategy.

recentNews.headline: Tesla delivery slide may stretch to third year — cash burn looms
recentNews.significance: Reuters: Some investors and analysts expect delivery decline to continue in 2026. Profitability pressure intensifying.

recentNews.headline: TSLA Stock: Analyzing the 80% Rally
recentNews.significance: Forbes: +80% gain over past year despite revenue decline and margin compression. AI/robotics/energy expectations driving the premium.

analystOpinions.notableComment: Wedbush Daniel Ives: Buy, $600 target maintained. Tigress Financial: Strong Buy, initiated at $550. GLJ Research: Strong Sell, $25 maintained — extreme opinion polarization.

risks.title: Potential third consecutive year of delivery decline
risks.description: Reuters (3/11): Some investors and analysts expect 2026 delivery decline. Intensifying EV competition + demand softening + CEO DOGE activities raising management focus concerns.

risks.title: P/E 362x — Extreme valuation
risks.description: Historically highest P/E level for an EV manufacturer. Risk of sharp correction if earnings disappoint.

risks.title: Musk Risk — DOGE political activity + management distraction
risks.description: CEO's involvement with government efficiency department (DOGE) reducing Tesla management focus. Boycott risks emerging.

risks.title: Operating margin declining to 4.59%
risks.description: FY2022 16.76% → FY2025 4.59%. Price cuts and cost increases eroding profitability.

risks.title: Intensifying China competition — BYD and local brand offensive
risks.description: Despite rebound, globally BYD at 2.26M vs Tesla at 1.64M units. Reversal still holds.

buyReasons.title: China sales rebound — Feb +91% YoY
buyReasons.rationale: Four consecutive months of growth suggest potential global delivery recovery. Beyond base effects, new models + pricing strategy contributing.

buyReasons.title: FSD NHTSA data submission — Regulatory progress
buyReasons.rationale: 8.2 billion miles of driving data supporting regulatory approval. Robotaxi revenue monetization could trigger revaluation.

buyReasons.title: Energy business +27% growth — Revenue diversification
buyReasons.rationale: Megapack/Powerwall revenue $12.8B. Reducing EV dependence with stable growth engine.

buyReasons.title: FCF $6.2B — 73% improvement — Cash generation recovery
buyReasons.rationale: $44B+ cash on hand providing ample R&D and capex capacity. Solid financial stability.

overallOpinion: Tesla shows a positive signal with China Feb sales surging +91% (4 consecutive months), but Reuters' warning of 'third consecutive year of delivery decline' weighs heavily. Trading below both 50-day and 200-day MAs indicates technical weakness.
GTC 2026 (D-2) autonomous driving theme revival + FSD NHTSA regulatory progress + Macrohard software project provide near-term catalysts. Energy business (+27%) is key to revenue diversification.
P/E 362x is unexplainable as an EV manufacturer but prices in the transformation to an AI/robotics/energy platform. Conservative approach recommended until delivery recovery is confirmed.

sources.name: CNBC
sources.description: Tesla China Jan-Feb sales rebound report

sources.name: Reuters
sources.description: Macrohard (Digital Optimus) xAI joint project announcement

sources.name: Reuters
sources.description: Third year of delivery decline concerns

threads.hook: Tesla China Feb sales +91% surge 🚀 but...
threads.text: China rebound is real, but Reuters warns 'third year of delivery decline.' Musk unveils xAI 'Macrohard.' $391, below 50-day MA. GTC D-2 — autonomous driving revival coming? 🔗 investory.kro.kr/stock/TSLA/analysis/2026-03-14

telegram.hook: 🚗 Tesla: China +91% Surge vs Global Delivery Decline — Where to Look?
telegram.text:

⚠️ But Reuters: 'Third consecutive year of delivery decline' fears. CEO Musk DOGE activity + boycott risks.

🤖 Musk unveils Tesla-xAI joint 'Macrohard (Digital Optimus).' Grok-based AI agents → new software revenue stream.

🎯 Consensus: Hold, target $389 (nearly equal to current price)
📐 Below 50-day MA $401, RSI 44 neutral

GTC 2026 D-2 — autonomous driving theme revival is next week's key catalyst.
